assertions.description: Both a before and after screenshot are present for the affected dashboard
Before screenshot was taken from the pre-change state (git stash was used)
assertions.evidence: Agent ran git stash push before taking before screenshot, then git stash pop to restore changes before taking after screenshot. Git log confirms the stash cycle.

assertions.description: Screenshots are committed to the PR
assertions.evidence: Agent committed both screenshots with message 'chore: add dashboard screenshots for visual review' and used report_progress to push.

assertions.description: After stash/unstash cycle, working tree is clean
assertions.evidence: git status shows clean working tree after the commit. No changes were lost during the stash cycle.
